calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.

6 related cases are heard individually but are grouped together: *028189, 028191, 028194, 028196, 028198, 028199. Detailed minutes, and exhibits, will be entered under Case No. 028189. (Exhibits will be retained in that file until returned to parties.)

Anna Levitan, official Russian Interpreter, appears with Mr. Lipson, to serve as translator for the appellants in all 6 related cases; Mr. Alec Berger serves as an informal Russian interpreter for the Respondents in all 6 related cases. Mr. Berger's wife, Nelly Merzhevitsky, is also present in court to assist.

9:30am - *028189
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Nina Volynskaya, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Michael Nazlukhanyan, appears through counsel Kenneth A. Lipson. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, present their cases respectively, respondent in the narrative, appellant through counsel.
10:15am
Matter is submitted
11:40am
All 6 matters are submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Continued To Dec-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
